description: GROUP BY with HAVING clause and parameter
name: group_by_having
query_sql:
-- @name CountByDepartmentHaving
-- @returns :many
SELECT department, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sales GROUP BY department HAVING COUNT(*) > $1
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE sales (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, employee_id INTEGER NOT NULL, department TEXT NOT NULL, amount INTEGER NOT NULL, sale_date DATE NOT NULL);
